originalTitle: 1M FPS mini-DoTA/LoL for reinforcement learning. Dev day #8
title: Debugging Reward Scaling and Training Sanity for Mini-MOBA RL Environment
summary: Debugged reward scaling issues in a mini-MOBA environment where negative rewards were causing overflow in observation encoding. Made the environment human-playable to verify control and reward mechanics. Investigated why agents failed to learn simple movement to center despite correct observations and rewards, discovering potential policy collapse or action space bugs.
